title: AAEP Message: clarification.reply
description: Subscriber's reply to an agent.awaiting.clarification event. Conveys the user's clarification response. The response field is polymorphic: its type depends on the accepted_response_kinds of the originating event (string for freetext or multiple_choice, boolean for yes_no, number for numeric). Like confirmation.reply, this message is single-use per reply_token. Defined normatively in Chapter 6 §6.5 of the AAEP specification.

reply_token.description: The exact reply_token from the originating agent.awaiting.clarification event. Subscribers MUST echo this token verbatim.

response.description: The user's clarification response. Type is determined by the originating event's accepted_response_kinds: string for 'freetext' or 'multiple_choice', boolean for 'yes_no', number for 'numeric'. For multiple_choice, the value MUST match one of the values listed in the originating event's choices array.

subscription_id.description: The subscription on which this reply is sent.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the user provided the clarification. Used by the producer to verify timeout compliance.

decided_by.description: Identifier of the user who provided the clarification.

confidence.description: Subscriber-reported confidence in the clarification, between 0 and 1. Useful for voice-input subscribers where speech recognition may have uncertainty.

correlation_id.description: Optional trace identifier for cross-system correlation.

examples.response: I want to retire at 67 because I expect to receive full Social Security benefits at that age.
